auth.title: Welcome back

modules.comingSoonBody: This module is part of the platform roadmap and will be activated in an upcoming phase. The foundation, navigation, and theming are ready.

orders.title: Orders & Fulfilment
orders.subtitle: Browse, search, and create orders with automatic pricing and warehouse routing.
orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by order #, customer, or phone

empty.title: No orders found
empty.body: No orders match your filters. Try clearing the search or creating a new order.

detail.title: Order {orderNumber}
detail.splitNote: This order is split across {count} warehouses.
detail.carrierChangeBlocked: Cannot change carrier after waybill is created.

splitDialog.title: Split shipment
splitDialog.subtitle: Select the items and quantities to move to a new shipment.

zatca.title: ZATCA e-Invoice
zatca.qrHint: Encoded per ZATCA QR spec v1.1
zatca.noCsidNote: ZATCA_CERT and ZATCA_CSID are not configured — invoice artifact is ready but submission is skipped.

form.title: New order
form.subtitle: Enter a phone number to load the customer, add items, and we'll price and route the order automatically.
form.notFound: No customer with that phone. Create one below.
form.wholesaleBanner: Wholesale pricing active — {tier} tier. MOQ is enforced per line.
form.retailBanner: Retail customer — base pricing applies, no minimum order quantity.
form.itemSearchPlaceholder: Search products by name, brand, or SKU
form.noItems: No items yet. Search and add products above.
form.fixMoq: Resolve MOQ warnings before placing the order.

errors.phoneTaken: A customer with this phone already exists.
errors.moqViolation: Some lines are below their minimum order quantity.
errors.outOfStock: Some items are out of stock at every warehouse.
errors.variantNotFound: One or more products could not be found.
errors.credit_limit_exceeded: This order would exceed the customer's credit limit.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

overview.title: Overview & Analytics
overview.subtitle: Executive view of sales, margin, and channel performance across Dar Al-Amirat.

kpi.orderCountHint: All orders in the selected range

catalog.title: Items & Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Manage products, variants, B2B pricing, and bulk-import your catalog.
catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, brand, or SKU

empty.title: No products yet
empty.body: Create your first product, or bulk-import a catalog from an Excel file.

form.createSubtitle: Add a product with at least one variant.
form.editSubtitle: Update product details, variants, and B2B pricing.
form.activeHint: Inactive products are hidden from ordering.
form.priceOverrideHint: Leave empty to use the base price.
form.atLeastOneVariant: A product needs at least one variant.
form.noTierPrices: No B2B prices set. Add a tier price so salons get wholesale rates.
form.confirmDelete: Delete this product and all its variants? This cannot be undone.

ai.error: AI generation failed. Please try again.

errors.skuTaken: That SKU is already in use.
errors.variantSkuTaken: A variant SKU is already in use.
errors.variantInUse: A variant can't be removed — it's referenced by an order. Deactivate the product instead.
errors.productInUse: This product can't be deleted — it has orders. Deactivate it instead.
errors.imageUrlInvalid: Enter a valid image URL (must start with https://).
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

importPage.title: Bulk import
importPage.subtitle: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) file to create or update products and variants.
importPage.how1: One row per variant. Rows sharing a SKU describe the same product.
importPage.how2: Products are matched by SKU, variants by variant SKU — existing rows are updated, new ones created.
importPage.how3: The category column must be a valid category slug (see the template's categories sheet).
importPage.dropzone: Choose a .xlsx file or drag it here

errors.parseFailed: Couldn't read that file — is it a valid .xlsx?
errors.empty: The sheet has no data rows.
errors.variantSkuDuplicate: Duplicate variant SKU in the file.
errors.variantSkuOwnedByOther: Variant SKU already belongs to another product.
errors.skuConflict: Rows with this SKU have conflicting product details.

importExportPage.title: Import & Export Products
importExportPage.subtitle: Bulk-update your catalog and review the history of every import and export job.

empty.title: No import or export jobs yet
empty.body: Start a bulk import or export your catalog to see the job history here.

export.title: Export catalog
export.subtitle: Download your products and variants as an Excel (.xlsx) file.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

links.sectionSubtitle: Link related products to boost discovery and average order value.
links.crossSellHint: shown alongside this product ("You might also like")
links.upSellHint: shown as premium alternatives ("Consider upgrading to")

shadeFinder.title: AI Shade Finder
shadeFinder.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions and Gemini will recommend the best foundation and concealer shades from our catalog.

undertone.question: What is your skin undertone?
undertone.coolHint: You look better in silver jewellery and pinkish hues
undertone.warmHint: You look better in gold jewellery and earthy tones
undertone.neutralHint: Both silver and gold look good on you

coverage.question: What coverage do you prefer?
coverage.mediumHint: Even skin tone with a hint of coverage
coverage.fullHint: Maximum coverage for a flawless look

results.title: Your recommended shades
results.subtitle: Based on your answers, Gemini recommends these {count} products from our catalog.
results.noResults: No matching shades found in the catalog. Try adjusting your answers.

errors.noCatalog: No foundation or concealer products are available in the catalog right now.
errors.rateLimited: The AI request limit has been reached. Please try again in a moment.
errors.unavailable: The AI service is busy right now. Please try again in a few seconds.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
